## Dictionary

- [ ] `SinoNom_Similar.dic` (S1 — visual similarity)
- [ ] `QuocNgu_SinoNom.dic` (S2 — QN → SinoNom translations)

## Entries to Add / Correct

```
# New entries (follow the existing format)
<char>:<similar1> <similar2> ...     # for S1
<quoc_ngu>:<sinonom1> <sinonom2> ... # for S2
```

Where do these entries come from?

- [ ] Thiều Chửu Hán-Việt từ điển
- [ ] Nom Foundation annotated corpus
- [ ] Personal expert knowledge
- [ ] Other: ___
